title: QAT OLE
description: Quantum Advantage Tracker Operator Loschmidt Echo (OLE) benchmark. Loads a pre-compiled circuit from the QAT repository and estimates ⟨Z_52 Z_59 Z_72⟩, where a value close to 1.0 indicates low decoherence.

benchmark_name.description: Name of the benchmark. Must be 'QAT OLE' for this schema.

circuit.description: Which QAT OLE circuit to run. '49Q_L3' and '49Q_L6' use a 49-qubit Ising lattice with L=3 or L=6 Trotter steps. '70Q_L6' uses a 70-qubit lattice with L=6 steps. All circuits are transpiled to 156 physical qubits and require a large-scale quantum device.

shots.description: Number of measurement shots per circuit execution.
